title: Spaghetti Bolognese
description: A classic Italian pasta dish with rich meat sauce.
instructions: Cook the spaghetti according to package instructions. In a separate pan, sauté the meat and add the sauce. Combine and serve.

title: Chicken Curry
description: A flavorful curry dish with tender chicken pieces.
instructions: In a large pan, sauté the chicken until cooked through. Add the curry paste and cook for a minute. Stir in the coconut milk and simmer for 20 minutes.

title: Vegetable Stir-Fry
description: A quick and healthy stir-fry with fresh vegetables.
instructions: Heat the oil in a wok over high heat. Add the vegetables and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes. Add the sauce and cook for another minute.

title: Caesar Salad
description: A classic salad with crisp romaine lettuce and creamy dressing.
instructions: Rinse the lettuce and pat dry. In a large bowl, whisk together the dressing ingredients. Add the lettuce and toss to coat.

title: Pancakes
instructions: In a bowl, mix the flour, milk, and eggs until smooth. Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat and pour in the batter. Cook until bubbles form, then flip and cook until golden brown.

title: Grilled Salmon
description: A simple and delicious grilled salmon recipe.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat. Brush the salmon fillets with olive oil and season with salt and pepper. Grill for 4-5 minutes on each side until cooked through.

title: Chocolate Chip Cookies
description: Classic cookies loaded with chocolate chips.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 180°C. In a bowl, cream together the butter and sugars. Add the eggs and vanilla extract, then mix in the flour and chocolate chips. Drop spoonfuls of dough onto a baking sheet and bake for 10-12 minutes until golden brown.

title: Beef Tacos
description: Tasty tacos filled with seasoned beef and fresh toppings.
instructions: In a skillet, cook the ground beef until browned. Add the taco seasoning and water, and simmer until the sauce thickens. Serve the beef in taco shells with your favorite toppings.

title: Margherita Pizza
description: A simple and delicious pizza topped with fresh tomatoes, mozzarella, and basil.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 220°C. Spread tomato sauce over the pizza base, then top with sliced mozzarella and fresh basil leaves. Bake for 10-12 minutes until the crust is golden and the cheese is bubbly.

title: Lemon Garlic Shrimp
description: A quick and flavorful shrimp dish with a zesty lemon garlic sauce.
instructions: In a skillet, melt the butter over medium heat. Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute until fragrant. Add the shrimp and cook until pink, then stir in the lemon juice and parsley. Serve immediately.
